creator: nakaji@tutrp.tut.ac.jp
text:
1. On FreeBSD(98), if tk42jp or tk80jp is installed, XF98Setup should be built
   with it and doc/Japanese should be installed because pc98 is popular in Japan.
   I modified scripts/configure for these purposes.

2. pkg/PLIST.pc98 needs some change for pc98.

Fix: 

Patch files are found at
1. http://www.rc.tutrp.tut.ac.jp/~nakaji/install/FreeBSD/ref/XFree86-19990728.diff
2. http://www.rc.tutrp.tut.ac.jp/~nakaji/install/FreeBSD/ref/XFree86-19990728-2.diff
respectively.
